payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall, narrow dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel and simple top trim; surface shows lighter central discoloration and minor scuffs, matte finish; left side is slightly edge-cropped in the image — approximate distance ~1.5 m from camera.
